title: odontosoria viridis
intro: Odontosoria viridis, also known as the green forked fern, is a species of epiphytic fern native to tropical Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Odontosoria viridis include reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in the treatment of various infections. Herbal preparations of the plant, typically made into teas or infusions, can be used to harness its medicinal properties, but more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
